/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpiper_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libpiper_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/piper_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/piper_msgs/msg/detail/piper_status_msg__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/piper_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/piper_msgs/msg/detail/pos_cmd__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/piper_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/piper_msgs/srv/detail/enable__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/piper_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/piper_msgs/srv/detail/move_to_home__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/piper_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/piper_msgs/srv/detail/move_to_pose__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/piper_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/piper_msgs/srv/detail/pick_place_request__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/piper_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/piper_msgs/srv/detail/set_grip_width__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
